title: alchemilla pungentiflora
intro: Alchemilla pungentiflora, also known as the 'Alpine Lady's Mantle', is a flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. Its medicinal properties make it valuable in herbal remedies, with its roots and leaves possessing anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla pungentiflora include the treatment of various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Alchemilla pungentiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
